playbook.intent: AI feature ask -> vetted UX pattern + trust signals + override + measurable metrics.
playbook.scope: Designer ships an AI feature (chat, copilot side-panel, inline autocomplete, or agentic action). Includes pattern selection, trust + disclosure framing, human-in-the-loop UI, streaming response UX, a11y, and trust metrics. Done when the feature ships with a defined trust dashboard and override paths.

success-criteria.criterion: Pattern selected and justified (chat / copilot / inline / agentic)
Trust + disclosure framing visible in UI
A11y coverage for AT users on AI surface
Trust metrics dashboard live with baseline

stage.name: Pick pattern

tasks.task: Map job (read / draft / decide / act) to pattern
Get sponsor sign-off on pattern choice

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when pattern is signed off.

stage.name: Trust + disclosure
stage.intent: Users see what is AI and what is not.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when disclosure is visible without effort.

stage.name: Human-in-the-loop

tasks.task: Add undo + audit log on agentic actions
Document confirmation patterns for irreversible acts

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when override path is always available.

stage.name: Streaming UX
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when interruption + partials work.

stage.name: A11y for AI
stage.intent: AT users get the same experience.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after AT testing passes.

stage.name: Validate with synthetic + real
stage.intent: Find failure modes before customers do.

tasks.task: Run synthetic-user scenarios across edge cases
Run real-user sessions on flagship flows
Adjust patterns to address failure modes

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when criticals are addressed.

stage.name: Trust metrics dashboard

tasks.task: Define trust signals (accept rate, undo rate, sentiment)

stage.decision-gate: Done when dashboard has baseline + review cadence.

extra.value: [Skipping disclosure -> trust collapse on first wrong answer, No undo on agentic actions -> users disengage, No streaming -> perceived latency tanks adoption]
['Is the AI source disclosed?', 'Can users override every AI act?', 'Are trust metrics being measured monthly?']

{human: faion get-content ai-feature-ux-pattern-playbook-shipping-copilot-chat-inline-ai-without-trust-col --format md, agent: faion get-content ai-feature-ux-pattern-playbook-shipping-copilot-chat-inline-ai-without-trust-col --format context, json: faion get-content ai-feature-ux-pattern-playbook-shipping-copilot-chat-inline-ai-without-trust-col --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
